entities.description: A specific area in Mali where groundnuts were tested for aflatoxin contamination.

entities.description: Different environmental regions used to categorize the sampling areas for groundnuts.

entities.description: The process of sampling groundnuts from farmers' fields and testing them for aflatoxin levels.
